parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.instruction }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'dall-e-3', prompt: 'Professional LinkedIn post image for an auto repair shop AI software company. Dark navy blue background with orange accent elements. Show a modern auto repair shop environment with subtle tech/AI overlay. Clean, minimal, corporate style. No text on the image. Photorealistic, high quality, 16:9 aspect ratio. Theme: ' + $json.postType.replace('_', ' '), n: 1, size: '1792x1024', quality: 'standard' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: '8747048300', photo: $json.dalleUrl, caption: 'LinkedIn post image (' + $json.postType.replace('_', ' ') + ')' }) }}

nodes.name: Telegram: Send Photo
nodes.notes: Sends DALL-E image to Telegram immediately. Telegram hosts it permanently.

nodes.name: Wait for Approval
nodes.notes: Pauses until user clicks APPROVE or SKIP link from Telegram. No webhook conflict.

parameters.jsCode:
const post = $('Merge Post + Image').first().json;
return [{ json: { postText: post.postText, imageUrl: post.imageUrl, postType: post.postType } }];

nodes.name: Get Post Data
nodes.notes: Pulls post from earlier in same execution. Wait node preserves full context.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ author: 'urn:li:organization:112782635', lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', specificContent: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': { shareCommentary: { text: $json.postText }, shareMediaCategory: 'NONE' } }, visibility: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC' } }) }}

nodes.name: LinkedIn: Publish Post
nodes.notes: Text-only post to LinkedIn Company Page via UGC API.

meta.description: LinkedIn auto-poster with Claude + DALL-E + Telegram approval + Wait webhook. No TelegramTrigger (avoids webhook conflicts).
bugs_fixed: BUG 3: TelegramTrigger replaced with Wait webhook
BUG 4: Fetch stub replaced with execution context
BUG 2: Image sent to Telegram immediately before URL expires
BUG 7: Full post text in preview (no truncation)
BUG 5: Requires Posts tab with headers: date|post_type|post_text|image_url|status
